evals.prompt: Configure my AI client to talk to Unity MCP over the default local HTTP server.
evals.expected_output: Configuration that points the client to http://localhost:8080/mcp and notes the Unity-side start flow.
assertions: Window > MCP for Unity start flow is mentioned
HTTP is presented as the default transport

evals.prompt: My MCP client prefers stdio. Show me the right Unity MCP config.
evals.expected_output: A stdio config using uvx and mcp-for-unity with --transport stdio.

evals.prompt: I have two Unity Editors open. How do I make sure the agent edits the correct project?
evals.expected_output: Use unity_instances to inspect available editors, then set_active_instance before any mutating tool calls.
assertions: The response warns against editing before selecting the instance

evals.prompt: Before generating a complex Unity script, how should an agent verify the API surface?
evals.expected_output: Guidance to use unity_docs and unity_reflect before create_script/manage_script and then validate_script/read_console after.
assertions: validate_script and read_console are both included
